subject: A meandering river winding through lush green rolling hills under a bright sky pierced by radiant sun rays
description: A pastoral basic-land vista: a wide blue river snakes through a valley of verdant rolling hills toward a distant horizon. The hills are dense with green forest cover, dotted with small clearings. The sky is bright and pale blue with scattered cumulus clouds, and a brilliant burst of sun rays radiates downward from the upper portion of the frame, hitting the river and casting glittering highlights on the water. The composition leads the eye from a broad foreground reach of the river backward into the receding hills. There are no figures or creatures visible. The palette is dominated by lush greens, water blues, and warm sun-washed whites — a calm, idyllic Eldraine countryside.
foreground: broad reach of a blue river with reflective water and grassy banks
background: rolling forested hills receding to a bright horizon under sun-pierced clouds
